🤖
Configure your AI provider and API keys. The selected provider is used for all AI features across the app — autofill, reports, the AI Helper chat, and document extraction.
Free tier ~1,500 req/day. aistudio.google.com
console.anthropic.com
platform.openai.com
openrouter.ai — 200+ models, many free
🤖
Choose a specific model for each feature. "Use default" uses whatever provider+model is selected above. Free models marked 🆕. Fast models marked ⚡.
Tests the currently selected provider with your saved key. Save settings first before testing.

🔗
Google services (Drive, Calendar, Gmail) connect via a single OAuth flow through the TWWP Rails API. One connection covers Drive, Calendar and Gmail — no separate logins needed.
Not connected
☁
Once connected via OAuth above, Drive read/write is enabled. Set your root folder ID to link the app to your TWWP Drive folder.
Folder must be shared as "Anyone with the link can view"
Cloud Console → Enable Drive API → API Key
Last segment of the folder URL
📅
Events created in the app can sync to your Google Calendar. Enter your Calendar ID (found in Google Calendar settings).
Found in Google Calendar → Settings → your calendar → Calendar ID
gmail.readonly gmail.send
Not configured — click Configure to set up email.
✉
Used for sending transactional emails (password resets, notifications) from your custom domain. Get a free API key at sendgrid.com.
📲
Send alerts (maintenance due, new member, deployment triggered) to a Slack channel.

Connect Trello to mirror cards in the Project Management board and push internal tasks to Trello. Get API key

The Rails API handles OAuth, data sync between devices, Drive access and email sending. Required for multi-device sync.

📍
The public-facing Tap-Map app is the source of member and waterhouse data. The Ops API reads from it directly via the Neon database connection.
☁
The Cloudflare Worker proxies product page scraping for AI Fill. Optional — only needed if using the catalogue AI autofill feature.
No trailing slash
🏠
Connect Home Assistant to pull live sensor data, control valves, and automate maintenance alerts.
S
Stripe handles payments and subscriptions. Publishable key is safe to store here. Keep the secret key private.

Configure your ESP32 water quality sensor module. Readings flow through Home Assistant into the WH Monitor.

Ops App v4.2
Dashboard
Inventory
Parts Catalogue
🔍
📦
Parts Catalogue tracks all hardware, sensors, filters and materials. Use AI Fill to auto-populate from a supplier URL. Import bulk orders via CSV. Status progresses from Unreviewed to Approved once validated.
0 selected
All
Unreviewed
Approved
Testing
Deprecated
Inventory
Kit Templates
🧱
Kit Templates bundle parts into reusable install packages. Add option axes (e.g. Filter Size) to create WooCommerce variable products. Deploy a kit to a location to track what's installed where.
All
Taplock
WQ Sensor
Filter
Waterhouse
Solar/Power
Custom
Inventory
Deployments
🚀
Deployments record which kit was installed at which location, and snapshot the exact parts used. This creates a permanent audit trail for each waterhouse installation.
Inventory
Inventory
📚
Inventory tracks physical stock — what you have, where it is, and its lifecycle state. Stock view shows In Stock items only. Created automatically when Purchase Orders are confirmed received.
Status:
In Stock
Deployed
Sold
Disposed
All
Group:
By Item
By Location
// ADD INVENTORY
Inventory
Purchase Orders
📦
Purchase Orders track what you've ordered from suppliers. When a PO is confirmed received, inventory entries are created automatically. Use the Confirm Receipt button when goods arrive.
// NEW PURCHASE ORDER
// PUSH TO SHOP
Locations
Waterhouses & Sites
🏠
Locations includes all Waterhouses, stock rooms, and test benches. Each Waterhouse can have a Guardian assigned, water rate, and VIP member target. Location data feeds into Monitor, Reports and Member Display.
All
Waterhouse
Stock
Test Bench
Sold
Procurement
Buyer Accounts
👤
Buyer Accounts register supplier platform logins for full purchase traceability. Each receipt in the inbox links back to the account it came from. Separate from Contacts (which tracks people, not platforms).
Procurement
Receipt Inbox
👙
Receipt Inbox ingests order confirmations. Paste an email, import a CSV export from AliExpress/Alibaba, or log manually. AI parses the items and pushes them to Catalogue as Unreviewed.
Paste Email
Import CSV
Manual
i
Paste an order confirmation email. AI will extract all items, prices and order details automatically.
i
AliExpress: My Orders → Export Orders → CSV  |  Alibaba: My Alibaba → Orders → Export
i
Manually log a purchase without a receipt.

Operations
Maintenance
🔧
Maintenance logs service visits to each Waterhouse. The 4-step wizard captures: Waterhouse, job categories (Filtration, Power, IoT, Security...), checklists and sensor readings, then generates a printable report and reimbursement receipt.

History

Operations
Reports
📋
Reports generates structured documents for guardians, sponsors, trustees, members and contractors. AI assists with narratives, issue flagging and final notes. All three report periods from Raj (WH1) are pre-loaded as demo data.
Choose Report Type
Saved Reports
People
Contacts / CRM
🔍
👥
Contacts / CRM is your unified people database. Guardians are Waterhouse hosts (like Raj). Members are VIP water collectors. Suppliers are hardware/product vendors. Trustees are governance members. Each contact can be linked to a Waterhouse and project. Use tags to organise by region, tier, or campaign.
All
Guardians
Members
Suppliers
Trustees
Sponsors
Contractors
💎 VIP
Projects
Project Management
Overview
Board
Timeline
Integrations
🎯
Projects tracks initiatives across all 9 project types. Each project has milestones, an owner, budget, and timeline. Linked to Waterhouses, contacts and financials. Use the capture button to quickly log project ideas from anywhere in the app.
All
Active
Planning
Complete
Paused
Drag cards between columns to update status
📅
Timeline shows projects on a basic Gantt chart. Each bar represents start → due date. Click a bar to open the project.
🔗
Integrations lets you connect external PM tools. Trello cards can be pulled into the Board view as read-only items, or internal tasks pushed to Trello lists.
📋
Trello
API Key + Token auth — get yours at trello.com/app-key
Not connected
Jira, Asana, Linear
Coming soon — add to backlog if needed.
Projects
R&D
🔬
R&D captures experimental ideas, sensor tests, new membrane research, and hardware experiments. Items here feed into Projects when they get traction. Log a reading, a hypothesis, or a supplier find and let the team weigh in.
All
Ideas
Testing

Trustees / Legal
Governance
🔑 PPSR
📄 Documents
⚖
Trustees / Legal tracks governance items, charity trust setup, PMA compliance, and legal documents. Trustee contacts are managed in Contacts.
All
Open
In Progress
Resolved
📄
Document Library stores metadata for all internal documents — constitutions, policies, contracts, agreements, and more. Upload a file to have AI extract the title and description automatically. The library stores document info; files can be linked to external storage (Google Drive, etc.) or re-uploaded when needed.
🔍
🔑
PPSR (Personal Property Securities Register) allows you to register a security interest over personal property in New Zealand. Use the wizard to prepare and log a PPSR registration. Each registration links to an asset from the Asset Register. ppsr.govt.nz ↗
// ADD DOCUMENT
💡
Upload a file to have AI extract the title and a short description. The file is not stored — only the metadata is saved. Paste a Google Drive or storage link in the External URL field to link back to the original.
// DOCUMENT
// CLASSIFY FOLDER
// PPSR REGISTRATION WIZARD

Doc Builder
📄
Doc Builder generates legal and operational documents prefilled from your app data. Pick a template, fill in the details, preview, then download as PDF or upload to Drive.

Email Registry
✉
Email Registry tracks outbound emails to contacts. Compose using templates, log sent emails, and track status. Configure a provider via Email Settings to enable live inbox and sending.

📧
Gmail uses your existing Google OAuth token (configured in AI & Integrations). Ensure you've completed Google OAuth setup first.
📨
Outlook uses Microsoft Graph API. You'll need to register an Azure app and provide a client ID. OAuth flow is initiated via the Rails API.

Blog lets you draft and publish content for thewholeywaterproject.com. Use the Editor tab to write posts with rich formatting. Published posts sync to the Tap-Map site via the blog_posts table.

💴
Transactions tracks reimbursements, donations, expenses, and income. All NZD. Export to CSV for your accountant.
Payment Tools:
📊
Services & Expenses tracks all recurring and one-off operating costs — hosting, legal, insurance, travel, connectivity, and more. Use the Import tab to parse receipts or emails.
📋
Accounting Ledger shows a unified view of all money in and out — transactions, services, purchase orders, and donated items — with a running balance. Set an opening balance to reflect your actual starting position.
to
Opening balance: NZD
🏢
Asset Register shows the total value of all physical assets — purchased inventory at cost, donated items at estimated value, and any manually registered assets. Updated automatically from Inventory and Purchase Orders.
🎁 Donated Items Register
↑
Import lets you add items to the Catalogue and Inventory in bulk — via CSV, email paste, or receipt/invoice upload. The wizard reviews extracted items before saving anything.

AI fills catalogue item from link

🏢
Register assets not captured through the import wizard — vehicles, tools, infrastructure, intellectual property, or anything else of value to the organisation.

Finance
Organisations
🏛
Organisations lists all partner organisations and shops connected to the Ops App. Mana Fuente is the primary sales and purchasing entity for TWWP. Click any org to manage its details. Add new organisations with the + button or from the Dashboard.
Commerce Tools
🛒
WooCommerce Export
Export approved items and kits as WooCommerce import CSV
AI
AI Helper / Notes
🤖
AI Helper is your built-in operations assistant. Click the floating button (bottom right) or type here to get help with any page. It classifies your input into structured feedback buckets that help improve the app. All conversations and ideas are saved here.
i
Use the floating + button (bottom right) to quickly capture notes, leads, tasks, project ideas, R&D items, legal follow-ups, or app feedback from anywhere in the app. Or open the AI chat panel from the bottom-right.
Captured Ideas & Feedback
Operations
Approval Queue
✅
Approval Queue aggregates items needing a decision from across the app: unreviewed captures, financial entries without approval, maintenance jobs awaiting sign-off, and pending reimbursements. Approve, reject, or view each item directly here.

Dev

Dev History

Usage
Platform Spec
Knowledge Base
📋
Dev History is a log of every change to the app. Claude adds entries automatically at the end of sessions where features changed or decisions were made. You can also add your own entries below. Entries are stored permanently in the JS constant and also in localStorage.
✅
Dev Tasks are developer and build tasks reconciled from the backlog. These are different from project tasks (which belong to campaigns and waterhouses). Dev tasks track what needs building in the app itself. All tasks persist in localStorage and reload next session.
💬
Captures shows everything saved via the + button. Click a type card to see its history. Each item can be triaged: Added to Backlog, Discarded, or left as Undecided. All items persist between sessions.
📋
Backlog shows the build backlog groups loaded from the BACKLOG_GROUPS constant. Each item can be tracked. Tick items done to update their status — this is saved in localStorage so progress persists.
ADRs
Block Index
Growth Log
Dev Notes
📜
Architecture Decision Records capture every significant choice. Claude updates these automatically. Use [REF:ADR-xxx] to cross-reference.
Current Sprint
📚
Knowledge Base is a living staff handbook fed into every AI call. Write SOPs, FAQs, glossary entries, and procedures here. Toggle Always Inject to include an entry in every AI request automatically — the AI will read it before answering anything.
// ADD KNOWLEDGE ENTRY
// LOG SESSION
// IMPORT FROM SESSION SUMMARY
💡
Paste a session handoff or summary below. The AI will extract a structured growth entry from it.
// DOCUMENT PREVIEW
// IMPORT DOCS TO KNOWLEDGE BASE
Select documents to import. Each document's title and description become a Knowledge Base entry. Documents without a description are skipped.
Projects
Tasks
✅
Tasks are operational tasks linked to projects, waterhouses, and modules. Toggle the view to see all tasks, dev tasks, or both together. Due dates auto-sync to Calendar.

STEP 1 OF 7
🛠 Dev
DEV NOTES
— select a page
Navigate to any page to see its dev notes here.
Dev
Platform Spec & ADRs
ADRs
Block Index
Growth Log
Dev Notes
📜
Architecture Decision Records capture every significant choice made about how the platform is built — the problem, what was considered, what was decided, and why. Claude updates these automatically when decisions are made. Use [REF:ADR-xxx] to cross-reference from other entries or pages.
⚠ X ADRs are in localStorage only
These ADRs will be lost if the browser is cleared. Ask Claude Code to make them permanent.
📜
Block Index is a stable map of all major platform systems and sections. IDs like SYS-INF-001 never change even when sections are reorganised. Use them in ADRs and dev notes to create traceable cross-references.
📜
Growth Log records what changed, when, and why. Claude adds an entry at the end of every session where decisions or features changed. This gives any future developer or Claude session a dated history of how the platform evolved.
⚠ X entries are in localStorage only
These entries will be lost if the browser is cleared. Ask Claude Code to make them permanent — paste the output below into your next session.
📜
Dev Notes shows the current build intent, open questions, and implementation notes for each page. These are also visible in the per-page Dev Notes panel (the toggle button on every page). Notes are hardcoded in the DEVNOTES constant and updated by Claude.
// ADD ADR
💡
ADRs added here are saved to localStorage and shown in the app. To make them permanent (survive a browser clear), Claude must also add them to the SPEC_ADRS constant in the JS at the end of the session.
// ADD GROWTH ENTRY
// DEPLOY KIT
